# Check for minimum age requirement (commonly 18 or 21, here we assume 18)
        if self.age < 18:
            return False
        # Check for required nursing degree
        if self.nursing_degree != 'yes':
            return False
        # Check for minimum education level (commonly high school or equivalent)
        if self.education not in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']:
            return False
        # All criteria satisfied
        return True
